title: hypericum selaginella
intro: Hypericum selaginella, also known as St. John's Wort or Goatweed, is a flowering plant in the family Hypericaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Hypericum selaginella include reducing symptoms of depression, anxiety, and stress, as well as alleviating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it due to potential interactions with medications.
